top_signals.title: Strategy Says It May Sell Up to $1.25 Billion of Bitcoin
top_signals.summary: Michael Saylor’s Strategy Inc. said it may sell up to $1.25 billion of Bitcoin to bolster its cash reserve and established two repurchase programs of up to $1 billion each for common and preferred shares.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Comcast soars 20% after announcing it will spin off media and tech wings into separate public companies
top_signals.summary: Comcast said it will separate into two publicly traded companies through a tax-free spinoff of NBCUniversal and Sky
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
